title: Friends & Creatures
description: Just a modpack I made for fun and to have fun with mods like Supplementaries, Aether, Alex's Mobs and Alex's Caves.
body:
![Tittle Logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/BPIvVZuR/images/08979e08006cf316f6f95543f30fc5e18d6d91f1.png)
## Descripition
**Friends & Creatures** aims to create a fun experience when alone or with friends with over 140 mods to create new adventures, enhance exploration with more structures to find, and make a better building with new blocks for building, no matter what playstyle you have!
**NONE** of the mods in this pack were made by me
## Features!
- New mobs with Alex's Mobs!
- New biomes with Regions Unexplored!
- Revamped mechanics with Create and Better Combat!
- Exciting exploration with Yung's mods and Alex's Caves!
- And much more!
